name: German Potato Salad (Rice)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, fry bacon until crisp; remove and set aside.
2. Drain all but 2-3 tablespoons of drippings.
3. Cook onion until tender.
4. Stir in flour; blend well.
5. Add vinegar and water; cook and stir until bubbly and slightly thick.
6. Add sugar and stir until it dissolves.
7. Crumble bacon; gently stir in bacon and potatoes.
8. Heat through, stirring lightly to coat potato slices.
9. Serve warm.
Yield: 6-8 servings.
